title: rich aerated kenyan dinner meat biryani
description: a date-night dish featuring a balance of spicy and sweet flavors, with a rich and aerated texture.
instructions: heat the coconut oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
add the beef short ribs and sear until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
add the kimchi to the pot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
add the cumin and coriander to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
add the rice to the pot and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
add 2 cups of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
add the beef short ribs back to the pot and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
season with salt and black pepper to taste.
serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
